title: AIIMS Nagpur Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Project Nurse II Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Project Nurse II Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their GNM can apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, app...
